fulfillment_conflict_report.picking_wave_summary: Plan prioritizes critical/high orders, prevents overselling, restricts cold-chain SKUs to D-COLD-CHAIN or H-CROSS-DOCK, and aggregates picks by zone.
fulfillment_conflict_report.summary: Analyzed 86 orders across 10 zones. 72 fully fulfilled, 14 partial, 0 unfulfillable. 5 SKUs had shortfalls.
